case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. PRO-X, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY COURT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRO-X, INC. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE EQUIPMENT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $14,204.85 DAMAGES, $1,750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $350.50 COSTS, $248.96 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,554.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT $ 3,800.00 VALUE OF PROPERTY ( EQUIPMENT )
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PRO-X, INC. DOES 1 THOUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-09-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-24-2004
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THOUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
